issue_summary: Introduced usage of nullable annotations for API validation.

	 * Returns the type of the field or throws an {@link IllegalArgumentException} if no field could be found.

javadoc_after:
/**
	 * Returns the type of the field or throws an {@link IllegalArgumentException} if no field could be found.
	 *
